thinking.text: The user seems satisfied with the information and is indicating they've applied on their own. They're not asking me to do anything further - they're just saying thanks. I should respond warmly and wish them well. No need for any tool calls here.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're welcome! I'm glad the EcoCard checked all the boxes for you. 🎉

To summarize why it's a great fit:
- ✅ **1.0% foreign transaction fee** — perfect for those crypto conferences abroad
- ✅ **1.0% minimum payment** — gives you flexibility
- ✅ **Virtual card management** — create, lock, or delete virtual cards to keep your spending tidy
- ✅ **No minimum credit score** to worry about

Keep an eye on your email for the decision, and once you're approved and activated, you'll be all set to start managing your card and creating those virtual cards right from your dashboard.

Best of luck with all your crypto trading and travels! If you ever need anything else, don't hesitate to reach out. Cheers! 🚀
